languages.text: "Я встреча{mf|л|ла} ксеносские устройства на платформе. Это тоже работа Декабалуса?"
"I have come across xenos devices on the platform. Is this also the work of Decabalus?"
languages.original_text: "Я встреча{mf|л|ла} ксеносские устройства на платформе. Это тоже работа Декабалуса?"

traits.locale_text: "I have come across xenos devices on the platform. Is this also the work of Decabalus?"
"I have come across xenos devices on the platform. Is this also the work of Decabalus?"
"I have come across xenos devices on the platform. Is this also the work of Decabalus?"

languages.text: 「プラットフォームで異質なデバイスを見つけた。これはデカバラスの仕業か？」
languages.original_text: "I have come across xenos devices on the platform. Is this also the work of Decabalus?"

traits.locale_text: 「プラットフォームで異質なデバイスを見つけた。これはデカバラスの仕業か？」

languages.text: «He encontrado dispositivos xenos en la plataforma. ¿También son obra de Decabalus?».
languages.original_text: "I have come across xenos devices on the platform. Is this also the work of Decabalus?"

traits.locale_text: «He encontrado dispositivos xenos en la plataforma. ¿También son obra de Decabalus?».

languages.text: “我在平台上发现了异形装置。这也是德卡巴洛斯的所作所为吗？”
languages.original_text: "I have come across xenos devices on the platform. Is this also the work of Decabalus?"

traits.locale_text: “我在平台上发现了异形装置。这也是德卡巴洛斯的所作所为吗？”

languages.text: "Ich bin auf der Plattform auf Xenosgeräte gestoßen. Ist das auch das Werk von Decabalus?"
languages.original_text: "I have come across xenos devices on the platform. Is this also the work of Decabalus?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin auf der Plattform auf Xenosgeräte gestoßen. Ist das auch das Werk von Decabalus?"

languages.text: "Platformda zeno cihazlarına rastladım. Bu da mı Decabalus'un işi?"
languages.original_text: "I have come across xenos devices on the platform. Is this also the work of Decabalus?"

traits.locale_text: "Platformda zeno cihazlarına rastladım. Bu da mı Decabalus'un işi?"

languages.text: « J'ai trouvé des appareils xénos sur la plateforme. Ce serait donc également l'œuvre de Décabalus ? »
languages.original_text: "I have come across xenos devices on the platform. Is this also the work of Decabalus?"

traits.locale_text: « J'ai trouvé des appareils xénos sur la plateforme. Ce serait donc également l'œuvre de Décabalus ? »
